goal: Move the existing cube at /World/Box from (1,0,0) to (3,2,0.5). Keep the same path, size, and prim — just update its translate op. Verify with get_world_transform.
thoughts: The cube was created with AddTranslateOp, so it already has an xformOp:translate in its xformOpOrder. Mutate the existing op via set_attribute on xformOp:translate — NEVER call AddTranslateOp on a prim that already has one. Verify with get_world_transform to catch silent failures.
code:
prim_exists(prim_path="/World/Box")

# Mutate the existing translate op — do NOT add a new one
set_attribute(
    prim_path="/World/Box",
    attr_name="xformOp:translate",
    value=[3.0, 2.0, 0.5]
)

get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/Box")
failure_modes: AddTranslateOp on a prim that already has xformOps — authoring is duplicated and the old translate may win (xformOpOrder not updated).
Creating a new cube at /World/Box_moved — task says move, not duplicate.
Editing via DefinePrim again — may clobber other authored attrs on the same prim.
Forgetting to verify — a silently-dropped set_attribute leaves the cube at (1,0,0).
qa_status: dialogue_canonical; structurally complete; not exercised in QA; classified 2026-05-15
